ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER ELLAHIE & FAROOQI LLP
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-07-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ELLAHIE & FAROOQI LLP'S MOTION TO LEVY COMMUNITY PROPERTY ASSETS OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR SPOUSE IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS NOT CLEAR ABOUT WHAT RELIEF IS SOUGHT FROM THE COURT. THE CITATION TO CCP 706.190 SUGGESTS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE SEEKING THE ISSUANCE OF AN EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT IT IS ENTITLED TO SUCH AN ORDER. (SEE, E.G., FAMILY CODE 911 (EARNING OF A MARRIED PERSON ARE NOT LIABLE FOR DEBT OF SPOUSE BEFORE MARRIAGE)). NOR HAS PLAINTIFF SERVED THE MOTION PAPERS ON MS. DROUBI, EVEN THOUGH HER RIGHTS ARE DIRECTLY IMPLICATED BY THE MOTION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ELLAHIE & FAROOQI LLP'S MOTION TO AMEND/MODIFY JUDGMENT is DENIED. The post-judgment alter ego procedure is not the correct procedure for what plaintiff is seeking to do. The correct procedure is the affidavit of identity procedure. (CCP 680.135).Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Levy Community Property Assets Of Judgment Debtor Spouse; Memorandum Of Point And Authorities In Support; And Declaration Of Omair M. Farooqui
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ELLAHIE & FAROOQI LLP'S Motion To Levy Community Property Assets Of Judgment Debtor Spouse is DENIED. The motion is not clear about what relief is sought from the court. The citation to CCP 706.190 suggests that plaintiff may be seeking the issuance of an earnings withholding order. However, plaintiff has not shown that it is entitled to such an order. (See, e.g., Family Code 911 (earning of a married person are not liable for debt of spouse before marriage)). Nor has plaintiff served the motion papers on Ms. Droubi, even though her rights are directly implicated by the motion. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELLAHIE FAROOQUI, TEL. NO. 1-408-294-0408 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHE APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Ellahie & Farooqui LLP's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/hk
